message:
refactor(distributed): rework recovery logic and add network verification tests

- recovery.rs: restructure the distributed recovery module to improve
  error propagation and simplify the re-encoding state machine,
  reducing nesting and clarifying the retry/reassignment flow
- tests/net_verification.rs: comprehensive network verification test
  suite covering transport-level connectivity, message framing, and
  distributed coordination handshakes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
